name: statistical-power
tagline: Sample-size/power calculations for study planning: closed-form tests plus simulation, with effect-size guidance and reporting templates.
verdict: Solid, well-structured stats skill: concrete formulas/code, sensitivity-analysis emphasis, clear scope boundaries. Minor gaps: no install-failure guidance, a few deps unpinned, long description.

highlights.summary: matplotlib and pandas (and lifelines on line 41) installed unpinned, though well-known packages from the default registry.
Workflow's install/compute steps have no explicit stop-and-report guidance if a package is missing or a script errors; only a compatibility-pin note and a sys.path hint exist.
Full description is ~915 chars, well past the ~500-char budget, though substantive rather than filler.
